hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const p=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=(p.tool_input&&p.tool_input.command)||'';if(/\b(node|npm|npx|pnpm|yarn)\b/.test(cmd)){const v=parseInt(process.version.slice(1));if(v<24)process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({continue:false,stopReason:'Node '+process.version+' detected - this project requires Node 24+. Run: nvm use 24 or install from nodejs.org'})+String.fromCharCode(10))}})"
